name: Tam Woolsey
voicePatterns: apologetic and hesitant — 'I'm sorry to bother you with this'
genuine worry that disarms — no pretense, no agenda
talks about his sheep with real affection
young voice, not yet hardened by the world
dialogueHooks: asking for help with his sheep that came back changed from the Thinning Forest
sharing what he's seen at the forest edge while grazing
expressing the Common Folk fear of things changing
offering simple gratitude that means more than coin

always: his three sheep came back wrong from the Thinning Forest
the forest edge has shifted closer this season
he knows every path around Thornwick from grazing routes
Maren used to ward the sheep-paths and no one does it now
sometimes: specific locations where the Thinning is worst near Thornwick
animals have been behaving strangely — birds avoiding certain groves
he saw lights in the forest at night — not fireflies
rarely: one of the changed sheep seems to respond to singing — Tam doesn't know why

afternoon.activity: grazing the flock near the village, avoiding the forest edge

evening.activity: quiet ale in the corner, listening to adults talk

backstory: Tam is 19 — the youngest adult in Thornwick's core cast. He inherited his family's flock and takes the responsibility seriously. He's not interested in cosmology, factional politics, or ancient mysteries. He just wants his sheep to be safe and the forest to stop being strange. When three of his sheep came back changed from the Thinning Forest, he didn't know who else to ask for help.
secret: One of the changed sheep responds to singing in a way that suggests the Fray transformation preserved some kind of pattern sensitivity. Tam doesn't understand the significance.
motivation: Protect his flock and keep things normal
tensions: wants normalcy in a world that's becoming anything but
brave enough to ask for help but scared of the answer
simple perspective that cuts through factional complexity

knownFacts: Bryn told him to ask the newcomer for help
bryn_oakheart.history: Tam trusts Bryn completely. She's the adult he goes to when things go wrong.
